evals.prompt: I want to use pm-skills to start discovering product opportunities for reducing churn. What do I do?
evals.expected_output: Install pm-product-discovery plugin and run /discover command
assertions: Response mentions claude plugin install pm-product-discovery@pm-skills
Response shows /discover command for opportunity mapping
Response explains Teresa Torres Opportunity Solution Tree

evals.prompt: How do I write a PRD using pm-skills?
evals.expected_output: Install pm-execution plugin and use /write-prd command
assertions: Response mentions key PRD sections (problem, user stories, success metrics)
Response suggests running /discover before writing the PRD

evals.prompt: I need to define our north star metric and OKRs. Which pm-skills plugins and commands should I use?
assertions: Response explains north star + input metrics relationship

evals.prompt: How do I use pm-skills to plan a product launch?
assertions: Response explains GTM launch phases (pre-launch, launch, post-launch)

evals.prompt: How do I install all pm-skills plugins at once?
evals.expected_output: claude plugin marketplace add phuryn/pm-skills then claude plugin install for each plugin
assertions: Response shows claude plugin marketplace add phuryn/pm-skills
Response shows install commands for all 8 plugins
